title: ReplayEnvelope
description: A canonical, replayable digest envelope for a runtime action. It captures the hashed inputs, environment, dependencies, seeds, and determinism bounds required to verify or reproduce a call outcome.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

callId.description: Identifier of the runtime call or state transition this envelope replays.

policyDecisionId.description: Optional URN of the PolicyDecision that authorized this replayable action.

capabilityTokenId.description: Optional capability token identifier active during the original action.

determinismMode.description: Determinism class for this replay: strict (bitwise stable), bounded (stable within declared tolerances), or best-effort (auditable but not fully deterministic).

inputsDigest.description: sha256: prefixed digest of the canonicalized runtime inputs.

environmentDigest.description: sha256: prefixed digest of the canonicalized runtime environment, including policy and sandbox posture.

dependenciesDigest.description: sha256: prefixed digest of binaries, libraries, and declared dependency set used by the action.

seedDigest.description: Optional sha256: prefixed digest of the randomness seed material used to bound replay.

clockSkewMs.description: Maximum tolerated wall-clock skew in milliseconds during replay verification.

networkMode.description: Replay-time network posture used to interpret determinism bounds.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about replay caveats or deterministic tolerances.

bounds.description: Optional replay bounds that explain the permitted tolerance window.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this envelope was produced.

envelopeHash.description: sha256: prefixed digest over the full canonical envelope content.
